title: HardLife
description: A very hardcore survival modpack, close to the vanilla experience, featuring stronger and smarter mobs, zombie hordes, beautiful graphics, and improved combat. Optimized for performance.
body:
A **very hardcore** survival modpack close to vanilla. Perfect for those who find regular Minecraft too easy. You’ll have to think about where to build your home, how to stay safe from zombies, and how to become stronger. The idea is to survive at least 20 days (peak difficulty).

Key features:
- **Improved enemy AI**: zombies can spawn with armor and weapons (sword, TNT, etc.), break certain blocks, and chase the player
- **Difficulty increases** over time up to a certain limit
- **A zombie horde** appears **every 3 days** — the later it is, the harder it becomes
- Improved, stylish **combat system with character progression** (parrying, dodge/roll, double jump, stat upgrades, effects, etc.)
- **Beautiful visuals** with great shaders, physics, detailed environments, and musical effects
- **Bosses** in certain locations if survival feels too easy
- Small improvements to various gameplay mechanics

I originally made this for myself and my friends, but decided to release it publicly. I’d appreciate your support with a like on this modpack or by subscribing to my Telegram channel, where you can leave feedback or suggestions and also see my other projects from different fields.

You should install PassiveSkillTree version 1.20.1 BETA 0.7.3a-all so you can level up additional character stats.

To make game physics even better, install Physics Mod Pro by downloading the 1.20.1 version here:
https://www.patreon.com/c/haubna/posts

Telegram channel: https://t.me/LeO_on_life  
Modpack author: LeO_on.  
Epic Siege Mod author: Funwayguy (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-siege-mod)
